full_text:
The tumor tissue piece looked like fat tissue but had a stiffer part within. It was hard to distinguish which was part of the tumor and which was just fat. Tried to remove some excess fat, and those leftover pieces were given to Sam from Kauppi lab.

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H).

Dispase dissociation media included 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 8.9 ml DMEM/F12+++, 1 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

RBC lysis with 5 ml for 4 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. After centrifugation, the pellet was still red-ish, so we redid the RBC lysis with 2 ml + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 2 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: RBC lysis with 4 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. After centrifugation, the pellet was still red-ish, so we redid the RBC lysis with 2 ml + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++.

The final pellet was resuspended in 2 mL of DMEM/F12+++.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 3x 6 E6 cells

Sequentially dissociated cells: 3x 6.85 E6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 9.41 | 11.0
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 6.38 | 8.3
 | viability [%] | 67.9 | 75.6
 | size [µm] | 9.2 | 7.6
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 8.60 | 9.56
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 5.97 | 7.28
 | viability [%] | 69.4 | 76.2
 | size [µm] | 9.0 | 7.9
Average | [cells/ml] | 9.005 E6 | 10.28 E6
 | total [cells] | 18.01 E6 in 2 mL | 20.56 E6 in 2 ml
 | viability [%] | 70.95 | 66.35
